title: Unit test: denied path
go_no_go_summary: Claude rated the S20 engineering deliverable GO with no P0/P1 findings. One P2 hardening item was accepted and fixed by making the denied-path helper consume expectedFailClosedOn metadata and assert exact deterministic error messages. Two P3 notes are informational and explicitly deferred: non-closure is already structurally enforced and unrelated untracked files remain unstaged.

findings.title: Denied-path test did not assert expectedFailClosedOn rejection reason
findings.summary: Claude noted that each denied case defined expectedFailClosedOn, but the helper previously asserted only that an Error was thrown.
findings.resolution: Updated packages/control-plane/test/service.test.js so assertHermesValidationDeniedPathCaseThrows validates the expectedFailClosedOn reason catalog and exact Error.message for each denied case. node --check and node --test packages/control-plane/test/service.test.js pass after the fix.

findings.title: S20 contract non-closure flags are not individually asserted by the validator
findings.summary: Claude noted that does_not_complete_RP00_P02 and does_not_close_RP00 are present but not directly asserted for the S20 definition.
findings.resolution: Deferred as informational because the weighted ledger terminal boundary, closeout handoff to RP00.P02.M04.S01, and source microphase completion state structurally prevent P02/RP00 closure in this subphase.

findings.title: Unrelated untracked local files appear in git status
findings.summary: Claude observed untracked .DS_Store and Law Firm OS UI/ entries.
findings.resolution: Deferred as unrelated workspace state. The S20 commit stages only S20 deliverable and closeout evidence files.

claude_cli.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools Read,Grep,Glob --disallowedTools Bash,Edit,Write,MultiEdit,NotebookEdit --output-format json

findings.title: Denied-path reason assertions
findings.summary: The helper now consumes expectedFailClosedOn and validates exact deterministic Error.message for every denied case.

findings.title: Validator direct non-closure assertions
findings.summary: No semantic risk because non-closure is structurally enforced by terminal ledger and M04.S01 handoff.

findings.title: Untracked unrelated local files
findings.summary: Unrelated .DS_Store and Law Firm OS UI/ are intentionally not staged.

required_followups: Continue with RP00.P02.M04.S01 Service entrypoint contract as the next subphase.
review_notes: Claude confirmed S20 is a test deliverable, not runtime behavior.
Claude confirmed the valid S18 baseline passes and all 36 denied cases fail closed.
Claude confirmed S20 completes RP00.P02.M03 and hands off to RP00.P02.M04.S01 without closing RP00.P02 or RP00.
parsed_review.summary: Claude reported GO and no P0/P1 issues. The only P2 was fixed before final closeout.

raw_claude_cli_result_summary.summary: Claude returned GO with one P2 hardening item and two P3 informational notes.
